name: @nmvuong92/fluxe
description: fluxe — khung fullstack tối giản, một runtime TS (RCA: Resolved Cell Architecture).
author: nmvuong92

scripts.resolve: npm run sync && cd app && node --experimental-sqlite --import tsx ../scripts/resolve.ts
scripts.build:client: npm run sync && cd app && esbuild frontend/client.tsx --bundle --format=esm --outfile=dist/client.js --jsx=automatic --loader:.tsx=tsx --tsconfig=../tsconfig.json
scripts.dev: npm run resolve && npm run build:client && cd app && node --experimental-sqlite --import tsx ../scripts/dev.ts
scripts.dev:node: npm run build:client && cd app && node --experimental-sqlite --import tsx ../src/server.tsx
scripts.test:all: npm run sync && npm run typecheck && npm run test:unit && npm run test
scripts.release: npm run test:all && npm version patch -m 'release: v%s' && git push --follow-tags
scripts.release:minor: npm run test:all && npm version minor -m 'release: v%s' && git push --follow-tags
scripts.release:major: npm run test:all && npm version major -m 'release: v%s' && git push --follow-tags
